<!--
CANON STATUS DEFINITIONS (for humans and AI):

canon       = The single authoritative version. Use as "truth."
published = Officially released, but may differ from current canon. 
gold          = Final pre-release version (e.g. studio mix, not public).
draft          = Incomplete/working version. Use with low trust.
obsolete    = Retconned, deleted, or replaced. Ignore for canon.
dream        = Non-canon, hallucination, AU, joke, or "what if." AI should NOT trust.
-->
